title: Ship v7.6 Provider-Neutral Session Export
description: Implement the v7.6 release slice: package agent/session evidence into provider-neutral export artifacts with schema, audit, redaction boundary, task/requirement/test/risk/decision/release-ready linkage, and release-state integration without depending on a vendor session stream.
triage_notes: v7.6 provider-neutral session export implemented with schema, writer, audit, CLI help, release-state integration, runtime evidence, and release docs.
